subject: Cloud Computing
title: Kubernetes: Google's Gift to Cloud
description: A fast breakdown of Kubernetes: Google's Gift to Cloud for builders.

hook.text: Google ran billions of containers with a secret system called Borg. In 2014, they shared it.

buildup.text: Kubernetes automates deploying, scaling, and managing containers across many servers.

discovery.text: It became the industry standard. Every major cloud provider now offers managed Kubernetes.

twist.text: Google open-sourced Kubernetes — but benefits most when you run it on Google Cloud.

climax.text: Kubernetes is so dominant that cloud strategy now often means container strategy.

punchline.text: Google gave away Borg's successor. It reshaped cloud computing.

quiz.question: What was the Google internal system that inspired Kubernetes?
